faqSection.label: Questions/answers:
faqSection.title: MORE THAN VISAS: COMPLETE LEGAL ADVISORY SERVICES IN BRAZIL WITH EXPERIENCED LAWYERS
faqSection.subtitle: We take care of everything for you, with the trust and experience of trilingual Brazilian lawyers.

faqs.question: I entered Brazil as a visitor. Can I extend my stay with the Federal Police?
paragraphs: For some nationalities, based on reciprocity, an extension is allowed. Documents may include proof of subsistence, invitation letter, airline ticket, application form, and service fee payment.

faqs.question: What is the time frame to use the visa?
paragraphs: The visa validity period is the period during which the visa may be used for entry into Brazil.
Visa validity is different from residence authorization period after registration with the Federal Police.
bullets: Visitor Visa: usually 1 year, multiple entries while valid
Temporary Visa: up to 1 year, multiple entries while valid

faqs.question: My address has changed. What should I do?
paragraphs: Foreign residents must keep information updated with the Federal Police Migration Department.

faqs.question: My passport is expiring. Can I still have the Brazilian visa issued in it?
paragraphs: To issue a visa, the passport should have at least 6 months validity and blank pages.

faqs.question: Who can I bring to Brazil through family reunification?
paragraphs: Family reunification may include spouse/partner, children and other relatives under legal conditions.

faqSection.label: QUESTIONS FRÉQUENTES
faqSection.title: Posez votre question maintenant
faqSection.subtitle: Nous nous occupons de tout avec confiance et expérience.

faqs.question: Puis-je prolonger mon séjour au Brésil ?
paragraphs: Cela dépend de votre nationalité. Nous vérifions votre situation et gérons la procédure.

faqs.question: Quelle est la différence entre visa et résidence ?
paragraphs: Le visa permet d’entrer au Brésil, la résidence permet d’y rester légalement.

faqs.question: Puis-je faire venir ma famille ?
paragraphs: Oui, via le regroupement familial prévu par la loi brésilienne.

faqs.question: Mon passeport expire bientôt, que faire ?
paragraphs: Il doit être valide au moins 6 mois pour obtenir un visa.
